idea-plugin.name: AgentPort
idea-plugin.description:
Universal ACP (Agent Client Protocol) client for all JetBrains IDEs — free, open source, no subscription required.

Connect any ACP-compatible AI coding agent inside IntelliJ IDEA, PyCharm, WebStorm, GoLand, and every other JetBrains IDE. Works on IDE 2024.2+, no JetBrains AI subscription needed.

Supported agents: Claude Code, Gemini CLI, GitHub Copilot CLI, OpenAI Codex, OpenCode, Goose, Aider, and 15+ more

Features:
  • ACP Registry browser — one-click connect to 20+ agents; npx agents launch without pre-installation
  • Agent thoughts & tool calls — see what the agent is thinking and every tool it calls, live
  • Model selector — switch AI models mid-session
  • Streaming responses — output renders as it arrives
  • Native Swing UI — no Electron, no JCEF
  • File edit support — agent changes applied directly to your project
idea-plugin.change-notes:
0.2.0
  • ACP Registry browser
  • Agent thoughts and tool call visibility
  • Model selector
  • VS Code-style chat UI polish
0.1.0
  • Initial release — auto-detects ACP agents on PATH, streaming responses, per-agent path overrides
